name: @rocketlang/kavachos
description: KavachOS — seccomp-bpf + Falco kernel enforcement for AI agents. Part of the xShieldAI Posture Suite.
author: Capt. Anil Sharma <capt.anil.sharma@powerpbox.org>

scripts.build: bun build ../../src/kavachos-cli.ts --target=bun --outfile=dist/kavachos.js && cp ../../src/kernel/cgroup-egress.py dist/cgroup-egress.py && cp ../../src/kernel/apply-seccomp.py dist/apply-seccomp.py
